title: How we use advanced analytics, automation and other technologies - Canada.ca
content:
## How we use advanced analytics, automation and other technologies : Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
We’re using new technologies, including advanced analytics and automation, to help process applications faster and reduce wait times for clients.
As more people want to come to Canada, our immigration system must adapt to better meet the needs of our country and of newcomers. Without the help of these technologies, we would see increases to our processing times and an impact on the high-quality client service we strive for. Advanced analytics and automation help streamline processing for a better client experience by
- making some positive decisions on routine cases
- sorting applications to be assigned to officers based on required expertise
- identifying applications that could need additional checks
- creating notes that summarize basic information for officers
- helping us respond to client emails and enquiries
We also use simpler technologies that organize data for officers from within our databases and from our partners. This helps officers access the information they need to process applications more easily and efficiently.
